hero.title: Password Generator
hero.description: Generate strong, customizable passwords securely in your browser.

flow.title: Customize → Generate → Copy
steps: Choose the length and character sets
Review strength and copy when ready

differences.title: Create secure passwords without extra steps
differences.description: Password Generator helps create strong passwords with clear controls and instant feedback.

items.title: Custom options
items.description: Choose password length and enable uppercase, lowercase, numbers, or symbols.

items.title: Secure generation
items.description: Generate passwords locally in your browser without sending them to a server.

items.title: Strength review
items.description: Check password strength and copy the result when ready.

feel.title: A direct path to a stronger password

items.title: Set your rules

items.title: Generate instantly
items.description: Create a strong password using browser-based generation.

items.title: Copy securely

audiences.title: Who uses Password Generator
audiences.description: Useful for anyone who needs strong passwords without saving them online.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Generate strong passwords for work accounts and tools.

items.title: Technical teams

items.title: Everyday users

items.title: Developers

resourceSection.title: Password-generation essentials
resourceSection.description: Control password length, character sets, and strength from one focused workspace.

items.title: Custom length
items.description: Choose a password length that fits your security needs.

items.title: Character sets
items.description: Include uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols.

items.title: Strength check
items.description: Review whether the generated password is weak, medium, strong, or very strong.

groupedSection.title: Generate a secure password
groupedSection.description: Use a direct generation workflow with clear options and instant output.

items.name: Length
items.description: Select the password length before generating.

items.name: Character sets
items.description: Choose letters, numbers, symbols, and ambiguous-character exclusion.

items.name: Password
items.description: Generate a new password instantly in the browser.

items.name: Review
items.description: Check strength, copy the result, or reset the options.

technicalSection.title: Designed for private password generation
technicalSection.description: Password Generator follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: Runs entirely in the browser with no server dependency.
Uses secure browser randomness for password generation.
Responsive experience across desktop and mobile devices.

finalCta.title: Generate a strong password
finalCta.description: Open Password Generator and create a customizable browser-only password in seconds.
